task_statement: P1 raw evidence secret/PII/provider-session scrub, rebased on current main (route-guard + ledger-local reason_refs guidance now landed). Recreate the raw scrub implementation and CLOSE the real implementation_gap on current main so support/checkers/profiles/raw_evidence_stream_scrub.yaml exists, is admitted in support/checkers/profiles/core.yaml path_allowlist, run_raw_evidence_stream_scrub exists in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py, and support/recording/raw_claim_trace.py scrubs raw JSONL streams. The prior broad blocker read_side_projection_boundary now passes on current main, so check_profile.py --all is expected to close. Prior P1d sandbox commit 86be1ef is support evidence only, not an adoption mandate.

nodes.work_statement:
P1d repair/replay work. Start from P1c evidence, especially closure remaining_delta and sandbox commit a743192cffa81becd977c0d778a3b5d1ae53ca58, as support evidence only. Recreate/adapt the P1 raw evidence scrub implementation in the current sandbox and close the real implementation_gap: support/checkers/profiles/raw_evidence_stream_scrub.yaml must be admitted in support/checkers/profiles/core.yaml path_allowlist or equivalent active core admission path. Preserve P1 scope only: raw evidence stream secret/PII/provider-session scrub in support recording/checker surfaces; no source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, Movement authority, scheduler/queue/retry, new axis, or release/dashboard hardening. Run py_compile for changed Python files, focused raw_evidence_stream_scrub profile, PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all, and git diff --check. Return changed_files, commands, observed evidence, and not_proven. Do not commit or push.

STRICT OUTPUT HYGIENE: Do not echo, print, cat, return, or include literal synthetic secret/credential/PII/provider-session fixture values in any Agent return, command output summary, transition concern, or diagnostic excerpt. Commands must be written so stdout/stderr contains only category labels, opaque probe ids, hashes, counts, file/evidence refs, and PASS/FAIL-style observations. If a probe would display a literal, suppress/redirect it and report only category/ref/hash.

P1d code attack QA. Independently verify the P1d work fixes the P1c checker admission gap: focused raw_evidence_stream_scrub profile and check_profile.py --all both run against this W1 worktree and are not red because of core path_allowlist. Probe raw scrub behavior through real writer/checker surfaces with QA-built probes and no literal sensitive output. If the gap remains, return transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap related to brick:brick-6-p1-raw-evidence-scrub-0701e-work. Return observations only; no Movement/quality/success judgment.

STRICT OUTPUT HYGIENE: Do not echo, print, cat, return, or include literal synthetic secret/credential/PII/provider-session fixture values in any Agent return, command output summary, transition concern, or diagnostic excerpt. If a probe would display a literal, suppress/redirect it and report only category/ref/hash.

P1d axis QA. Verify the repair remains Support/evidence integrity only: no Brick work truth, Agent return truth, Link Movement, success/quality authority, route target selector, release/dashboard hardening, or scheduler/queue/retry was introduced. Verify QA lane concerns remain local/non-binding before closure. If a real boundary defect remains, return local transition_concern_evidence only; closure is the Link-facing concern source.

Commands must be written so stdout/stderr contains only category labels, opaque probe ids, hashes, counts, file/evidence refs, and PASS/FAIL-style observations. If a probe would display a literal, suppress/redirect it and report only category/ref/hash.

P1d evidence integrity QA. Verify P1d evidence does not overclaim: focused profile and --all evidence are current, refs/proof_limits/not_proven are preserved, no required raw evidence is silently dropped, and P1 done condition is not claimed unless checker/profile admission and broad proof are current. Return missing evidence and checker_overclaim_risks if present.

P1e closure synthesis. Fan in work plus all QA bodies. Decide only observed/narrowly_proven/not_proven. If focused raw_evidence_stream_scrub profile, core profile, and check_profile.py --all are all green in current evidence and QA found no implementation/boundary/evidence gap, state P1 candidate closure evidence but do not mark the whole goal complete. If any implementation_gap remains (especially core admission), return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap, related_boundary_refs exactly ["brick-6-p1-raw-evidence-scrub-0701e-work"], binding false, and reason_refs ONLY to current Building ledger-local refs; cite external evidence in observed_evidence, never in reason_refs. Do not judge quality or success.

STRICT OUTPUT HYGIENE: Do not echo/print/return literal synthetic secret/credential/PII/provider-session values in any return, command summary, transition concern, or excerpt. Output only category labels, opaque ids, hashes, counts, refs, and PASS/FAIL observations.

not_proven: whether closure-origin implementation_gap will be adopted/rerouted/HOLDed until observed
